/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--export-dynamic -pthread "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_AAX_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_ARA.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_LV2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Standalone.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_Unity.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST2.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/NovaPitch_Standalone.dir/_deps/juce-src/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/juce_audio_plugin_client_VST3.cpp.o" -o "NovaPitch_artefacts/Release/Standalone/Nova Pitch"  "NovaPitch_artefacts/Release/libNova Pitch_SharedCode.a" -lasound -ljack libNovaPitch_WebUI.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libasound.so -lrt -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfontconfig.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so -flto
